query: SELECT SUM(CAST(troco AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_troco, SUM(CAST(financiado AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_financiado FROM febraban WHERE empresa = 'BMF' AND mesano = 526 AND situacao = 'Contratada';
